title: Inspect vehicles and equipment at motor sport events for compliance
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect vehicles and equipment at motor sport events for compliance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for scrutineering

pcs.text: Rules and regulations governing vehicle and driver eligibility and safety criteria for the event are interpreted1.2 Scrutineering bay is checked to ensure availability of required tools and equipment to perform tests and measurements1.3 Scrutineering documentation is sourced and prepared1.4 Hazards associated with work are identified and risks are managed according to workplace procedures and safety requirements1.5 Concerns are reported to Chief Scrutineer or Clerk of Course according to category rules and supplementary regulations as required1.6 Pre-race briefing session is attended and own role and responsibilities are confirmed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Rules and regulations governing vehicle and driver eligibility and safety criteria for the event are interpreted1.2 Scrutineering bay is checked to ensure availability of required tools and equipment to perform tests and measurements1.3 Scrutineering documentation is sourced and prepared1.4 Hazards associated with work are identified and risks are managed according to workplace procedures and safety requirements1.5 Concerns are reported to Chief Scrutineer or Clerk of Course according to category rules and supplementary regulations as required1.6 Pre-race briefing session is attended and own role and responsibilities are confirmed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Rules and regulations governing vehicle and driver eligibility and safety criteria for the event are interpreted1.2 Scrutineering bay is checked to ensure availability of required tools and equipment to perform tests and measurements1.3 Scrutineering documentation is sourced and prepared1.4 Hazards associated with work are identified and risks are managed according to workplace procedures and safety requirements1.5 Concerns are reported to Chief Scrutineer or Clerk of Course according to category rules and supplementary regulations as required1.6 Pre-race briefing session is attended and own role and responsibilities are confirmed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for scrutineering

elements.title: Confirm driver eligibility

pcs.text: Driver documents are examined to confirm status and eligibility for event according to category rules and supplementary regulations2.2 Driver clothing and equipment are examined for compliance with safety specifications according to category rules and supplementary regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Driver documents are examined to confirm status and eligibility for event according to category rules and supplementary regulations2.2 Driver clothing and equipment are examined for compliance with safety specifications according to category rules and supplementary regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Driver documents are examined to confirm status and eligibility for event according to category rules and supplementary regulations2.2 Driver clothing and equipment are examined for compliance with safety specifications according to category rules and supplementary regulations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Confirm driver eligibility

elements.title: Confirm vehicle compliance

pcs.text: Vehicle is examined to ensure it complies with mechanical and safety specifications for event according to category rules and supplementary regulations3.2 Compliance report is prepared and non-compliance is documented in scrutineering log book as required3.3 Defective vehicles, components or parts are impounded as required and according to category rules and supplementary regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Vehicle is examined to ensure it complies with mechanical and safety specifications for event according to category rules and supplementary regulations3.2 Compliance report is prepared and non-compliance is documented in scrutineering log book as required3.3 Defective vehicles, components or parts are impounded as required and according to category rules and supplementary regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Vehicle is examined to ensure it complies with mechanical and safety specifications for event according to category rules and supplementary regulations3.2 Compliance report is prepared and non-compliance is documented in scrutineering log book as required3.3 Defective vehicles, components or parts are impounded as required and according to category rules and supplementary regulations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Confirm vehicle compliance

elements.title: Monitor vehicle compliance

pcs.text: Vehicles are observed in assembly and starting areas to identify mechanical and safety problems4.2 Work done on vehicle during pit stops is observed to ensure it complies with relevant rules and regulations4.3 Vehicle damage is examined after an incident to determine roadworthiness for re-entry into event according to category rules and supplementary regulations4.4 Vehicle damage reports are prepared and logbook updated as required and according to category rules and supplementary regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Vehicles are observed in assembly and starting areas to identify mechanical and safety problems4.2 Work done on vehicle during pit stops is observed to ensure it complies with relevant rules and regulations4.3 Vehicle damage is examined after an incident to determine roadworthiness for re-entry into event according to category rules and supplementary regulations4.4 Vehicle damage reports are prepared and logbook updated as required and according to category rules and supplementary regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Vehicles are observed in assembly and starting areas to identify mechanical and safety problems4.2 Work done on vehicle during pit stops is observed to ensure it complies with relevant rules and regulations4.3 Vehicle damage is examined after an incident to determine roadworthiness for re-entry into event according to category rules and supplementary regulations4.4 Vehicle damage reports are prepared and logbook updated as required and according to category rules and supplementary regulations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Monitor vehicle compliance

elements.title: Communicate decisions and complete reports

pcs.text: Chief Scrutineer or Clerk of Course is advised of any breach of compliance according to category rules and supplementary regulations5.2 Participant reactions to decisions are managed and conflict situations are dealt with according to category rules, supplementary regulations and official’s code of conduct5.3 Inspection reports are checked to ensure they are completed accurately and are then signed5.4 Scrutineer’s report is completed at the end of event
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Chief Scrutineer or Clerk of Course is advised of any breach of compliance according to category rules and supplementary regulations5.2 Participant reactions to decisions are managed and conflict situations are dealt with according to category rules, supplementary regulations and official’s code of conduct5.3 Inspection reports are checked to ensure they are completed accurately and are then signed5.4 Scrutineer’s report is completed at the end of event?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Chief Scrutineer or Clerk of Course is advised of any breach of compliance according to category rules and supplementary regulations5.2 Participant reactions to decisions are managed and conflict situations are dealt with according to category rules, supplementary regulations and official’s code of conduct5.3 Inspection reports are checked to ensure they are completed accurately and are then signed5.4 Scrutineer’s report is completed at the end of event.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Communicate decisions and complete reports

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
